parameters.jsCode: const item = $json; const labels = Array.isArray(item.labels) ? item.labels.map(String) : []; const removeLabels = Array.isArray(item.removeLabels) ? item.removeLabels.map(String) : []; const normalized = labels.map(label => label.toLowerCase()); const reviewNeeded = normalized.some(label => label.includes('review-needed')); const primaryCategories = labels.filter(label => /^Category\//i.test(label)); const hasPrimaryConflict = primaryCategories.length > 1; const shouldNotify = reviewNeeded || hasPrimaryConflict || removeLabels.length > 0 || item.debug?.forceManualReview; if (!shouldNotify) return []; const subject = String(item.subject || '(no subject)'); const from = String(item.from || 'Unknown sender'); const reason = item.debug?.reason || (reviewNeeded ? '[review-needed]' : hasPrimaryConflict ? 'primary-category-conflict' : removeLabels.length > 0 ? 'remove-labels-present' : 'manual-review'); const color = reviewNeeded ? 16763904 : hasPrimaryConflict ? 15105570 : 5793266; return [{ json: { discord: { content: `Classifier review: ${subject.slice(0, 80)}`, embeds: [{ title: subject.slice(0, 256), description: from.slice(0, 400), color, fields: [{ name: 'Labels', value: labels.join(', ') || 'n/a' }, { name: 'Remove Labels', value: removeLabels.join(', ') || 'none' }, { name: 'Message ID', value: String(item.messageId || item.id || 'n/a'), inline: true }, { name: 'Reason', value: reason, inline: true }], footer: { text: 'Discord Classifier Review' }, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }] } } }];
